metadata.description: Claude Code skills for the SPL lab @ BGU — shared dev workflows and SLURM cluster operations.

plugins.name: dev-workflows
plugins.description: Shared development workflow skills — /brainstorm, /plan-review-simplify, /debug-and-simplify, /development-log, /simplify, /specialist. Bundles the simplifier and specialist subagents. Pure skills, no MCP server.

plugins.name: cluster-ops
plugins.description: Operate the BGU SLURM cluster from a local repo — queue status + pending-reason, submit/cancel, sync results, post-mortem (right-size --mem from sacct/MaxRSS), prioritize pending tasks. Requires one-time setup (see the skill's SETUP.md).
